summary: DPA page successfully implements the diner aesthetic with proper cream background, correct typography hierarchy, and all required content sections. The page meets screen spec requirements with effective date, section headings, and support contact information clearly displayed.

violations.description: Main article card background appears to use pure white (#ffffff) instead of the specified cream surface color (#fff8ea) for cards and content surfaces.

actions: Verify the article card background uses cream (#fff8ea) instead of pure white to maintain diner palette consistency
Consider adding the beta badge treatment if this page should include explicit beta framing per M.voice.1
